abilities.name: Hypothermia
abilities.text: When an enemy model within 3" declares an action due to a trigger, this model may drain a (soulstone) to cause that action to immediately fail.

abilities.name: Tundra Hunter
abilities.text: While within 2" of a friendly Ice Pillar marker, this model receives a (+) to all duels.

actions.name: Gnawing Emptiness
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a friendly Hunger token, it suffers a (-) to resist this attack.

triggers.name: Always Eating
triggers.text: Remove a marker within 2" of the target. Draw a card.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Desperation
triggers.text: Target must discard a card or gain a Hunger token.

actions.name: Ice Blast
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, the target gains a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Vantage Point
triggers.text: Enemy only. Make a Scheme marker anywhere in the area between this model and the target.

actions.name: Ice Tornado
actions.effects: Make an Ice Pillar marker within range. Enemy models within (x)3" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Thrive in Winter
triggers.text: Friendly non-living models within (x)3" of the made marker may move up to 4".
